title: /workspace mount missing nosuid
expected: PVC mount SHOULD include nosuid; SUID bit may set on disk but kernel must ignore it on exec
observed:
no nosuid in mount line; raw: -rwsr-xr-x. 1 sandbox sandbox 125640 May 30 18:31 /workspace/.suid_test
-rwsr-xr-x
/dev/longhorn/pvc-4a76aa5c-f185-4599-89d7-3fe6ab7bbc62 /workspace ext4 rw,seclabel,relatime 0 0
notes: readOnlyRootFilesystem + cap-drop ALL still mitigate, but defence-in-depth weakened.
